summary: Backend API regression and frontend E2E executed on preview URL. Core flows work (demo, navigation, manual multi-facture association with imported data, export trigger). Two backend issues found in validation/date parsing.

critical.issue: Accepts invalid bank_entry_id/invoice_ids and still returns 200 with success activity "Association manuelle ajoutée" (silent no-op).
ISO dates (YYYY-MM-DD) are misparsed (e.g., 2025-02-03 -> 2025-03-02, 2025-02-12 -> 2025-12-02), impacting matching logic based on due dates.

integration_issues.issue: Demo dataset auto-consumes credit entries, so manual association is often not actionable without importing custom data.

issues: Typo in title text: "Factures rapprochées, partielles ouen attente" (missing space).

action_items: Add strict validation in /api/reconciliation/manual-match: return 400 when bank entry does not exist, invoice_ids are invalid, or selected bank entry has no remaining credit.
Fix parse_date behavior in reconciliation_engine.py for already-ISO dates (avoid day/month inversion when input is YYYY-MM-DD).
Adjust demo dataset (or demo state) so at least one unresolved credit remains for manual multi-invoice UX demonstration.
Fix typo on results page heading text.
critical_code_review_comments: parse_date() uses pandas with dayfirst=True for all formats; this causes incorrect conversion of ISO-formatted strings and degrades reconciliation accuracy.
Manual-match endpoint lacks entity/state validation and can log a success activity despite not creating an effective match.
seed_data_creation: Created temporary test imports via UI/API (UI-INV-* and DATE-PROBE-* rows).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pytest API suite passed for target endpoints. UI manual multi-invoice flow works when using custom imports (not with current demo state). Re-verify after fixing date parsing and manual-match validation.
rca of the issue: RCA1: Date inversion comes from parse_date(value) calling pandas.to_datetime(..., dayfirst=True) unconditionally; ISO strings are interpreted as DD/MM in some cases. Mitigation: detect ISO pattern first and parse with strict format '%Y-%m-%d' before fallback parsing. RCA2: /manual-match route only checks invoice_ids non-empty; add_manual_link + recalculate can silently ignore invalid IDs/fully consumed bank entries, but activity still records success. Mitigation: validate bank entry exists + has remaining_amount > 0, validate invoice IDs exist and are open, return 400 on invalid requests.
